$schema: Project configuration for multi-instance Valor deployment

_doc.overview: Shared config for all Valor machines (iCloud-synced via ~/Desktop/Valor/). Each machine reads this file and filters projects by the 'machine' field matched against its ComputerName (scutil --get ComputerName).
_doc.personas: Define overlay file paths and permissions for each role. The bridge loads composable segments + persona overlay as the system prompt.
_doc.projects.machine: Must match the machine's ComputerName exactly (case-insensitive). This is how each machine knows which projects to handle.
_doc.projects.telegram.groups: Dict mapping group name to persona. Eng: prefix = engineer (full permissions, SDLC work + conversational), no prefix = teammate (mention-only).
_doc.projects.telegram.groups.chat_id: Optional Telegram chat ID. Speeds up group resolution but not required.
_doc.projects.telegram.bots: Optional (issue #1574). Registry of bot peers for E2E testing via 'valor-telegram send --await-reply'. A registered bot's inbound messages are recorded to history but NEVER spawn a session (deterministic loop-guard). Each id must NOT also appear in dms.whitelist (config validation rejects the overlap). settle_profile tunes the awaiter's debounce.
_doc.dms: Global DM config. All DMs use the specified persona regardless of project.
_doc.defaults: Fallback values for projects that don't specify a field.

engineer.name: Valor
engineer.description: Engineer persona — full permissions, handles both SDLC work and conversational responses

teammate.name: Valor
teammate.description: Casual teammate persona — conversational Q&A, light and helpful. Read-only, no code writes.

email._doc: Optional. Maps sender email addresses to contacts for this project. Email bridge will route inbound emails from these addresses to this project. Remove this section if email is not needed.

pm_briefing._doc: Optional. Daily PM voice briefing config (issue #1197). Set enabled:true to opt in. The reflection fans out per project: collects yesterday's merges + open bugs + upvote queue, drafts a numbers-free 30s voice note via Anthropic Haiku + Kokoro/OpenAI TTS, queues it to each target_groups group via the Telegram outbox, and posts a written follow-up with numbers + links right after. Schedule resolves in the project's local timezone. Hand-edit angles.include / angles.exclude to tune content. Remove this section if not needed.
pm_briefing.fallback_message: Nothing shipped yesterday — three things queued for today.

dms.description: All DMs use teammate persona. Casual conversation, read-only.
